value.title: EXCLUSIVE: Google And Meta May Have The Most To Lose In The AI‑Agent Era, Says Founder Who Rejected OpenAI
value.summary: The biggest winners from artificial intelligence may not be the companies building the most popular AI products. According to Div Garg, founder and CEO of AGI Inc., the companies with the most to lose in an AI-agent future could be some of today’s biggest technology platforms, including Alphabet Inc. and Meta Platforms Inc.. Garg, who famously turned down a lucrative job offer from OpenAI to build his own company, believes investors are focusing on the wrong question. Rather than asking which co

value.title: Veteran Tech Investor: Meta Is ‘One of the Best Advertising Machines Ever Built’ With 46% Upside
value.summary: On a recent episode of The Investor’s Podcast, investor Hari Ramachandra explained the bull case he saw for Meta Platforms after the stock fell roughly 20% from its peak, calling Meta Platforms (NASDAQ:META) one of the most mispriced large-cap opportunities available today.
